testQuery.name: Identify
testQuery.test: Service must respond to a legal OAI Identify query.

testQuery.name: ListMetadataFormats
testQuery.test: Service must respond to a legal OAI ListMetadataFormats query.

testQuery.name: ListSets
testQuery.test: Service must respond to a legal OAI ListSets query.

testQuery.name: ListRecords
testQuery.test: Service must respond to a legal OAI ListRecords query (and support the 'ivo_vor' metadata prefix and the 'ivo_managed' set).
